title: Selamat Ulang Tahun
story: A birthday welcome in Bahasa Indonesia, chosen to open this celebration especially for you.

title: Welcome to the Black Parade
story: One of the three bands you named without hesitation—a doorway back into the dramatic, emotional music you love.

title: In Too Deep
story: A bright, unforgettable piece of the pop-punk era—and a song already named inside our conversation about the music that stayed with us.

title: Welcome to My Life
story: You described Simple Plan as easy listening. This is one of the clearest snapshots of the sound you were talking about.

title: Dear Maria, Count Me In
artist: All Time Low · pop-punk / emo pick
story: A representative song for the pop-punk and emo thread in the chat. All Time Low was another band you brought into that conversation.

title: A Punkspring Memory
story: Not a song, but a small festival keepsake connecting a favorite band with the event you waited to see.

title: Suki Dakara
story: The sweet song you sang and shared. Its simple confession belongs naturally beside the gentler memories in this journey.

title: Boom!
story: The song from our chat: an energetic Simple Plan love song saved inside our soundtrack.
